rotated_tile_label: The room image is divided into lettered tiles. One tile has been rotated. Which lettered tile is rotated?

missing_patch_label: Which option exactly fills the missing region?

swapped_tile_pair_label: The room image is divided into 9 numbered cells. Exactly two cells have been swapped. Which option gives the two swapped cell numbers?
